description: A user who starts strong but fades (Sprinter archetype) wants to start a new fitness goal.

wizard_data.goal_description: I want to run a 5k in 3 months, but I always lose motivation after the first two weeks.
wizard_data.motivation: To feel healthier and have more energy for my family.

simulated_answers.past_success_factor: When my partner Alex checked in daily.
simulated_answers.biggest_obstacle: Energy after a long day of work.

golden_goal_plan.title: Your 5k Journey: Building Consistency with Alex

risk_mitigation.solution: A 'Two-Week Milestone' celebration with Alex is designed to create a new motivation peak.

description: A new user with a vague goal and no partner mentioned.

wizard_data.goal_description: I want to be more productive.
wizard_data.motivation: I feel like I'm wasting time.

simulated_answers.specific_productivity_goal: I want to spend one hour every evening learning a new skill instead of watching TV.
simulated_answers.biggest_obstacle: Feeling too tired to focus after dinner.
simulated_answers.accountability_preference: A simple checklist I can tick off myself would be great.

golden_goal_plan.title: Productivity Power Hour: Master a New Skill

risk_mitigation.solution: Start with a short 5-minute mindfulness exercise to clear your head before beginning.

description: A successful user tackling a complex, multi-faceted business goal with their partner.

wizard_data.goal_description: My partner and I want to launch our side business selling handmade crafts online in the next 6 months.
wizard_data.motivation: To build something of our own and create a new income stream.

simulated_answers.role_division: I'll handle the product creation and photography, Jamie will handle the marketing and website.
simulated_answers.first_milestone: Finalize the first 5 products and set up the online store.
simulated_answers.budget_question: We have a starting budget of $500 for materials and website fees.

golden_goal_plan.title: Side Business Launch: From Craft to Commerce

accountability_actions: Weekly business meeting to review progress against milestones and sync on tasks.

description: A user providing conflicting information about their availability.

wizard_data.goal_description: I want to learn Spanish. I have lots of free time to dedicate to this.

simulated_answers.time_commitment_clarification: Okay, realistically I can only commit to Saturday mornings for now.
simulated_answers.learning_method: I prefer using an app like Duolingo.
simulated_answers.partner_help: Casey can help me practice speaking once a week.

golden_goal_plan.title: Spanish Sprint for Your Spain Trip
golden_goal_plan.description: A focused plan to maximize your learning on Saturday mornings and leverage practice sessions with Casey.

risk_mitigation.solution: The plan focuses on high-intensity learning during the dedicated time and structured practice with Casey.

description: A user giving extremely brief, low-effort input.

simulated_answers.read_what: I want to read one non-fiction book a month.
simulated_answers.book_topics: I'm interested in history and science.
simulated_answers.when_to_read: I can probably read for 30 minutes before bed each night.

golden_goal_plan.title: Monthly Knowledge Quest: Read One Book a Month

daily_habits.description: Create a consistent reading habit to easily finish one book a month.
